Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3EB1 "THRUSTA-3EB1" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Thrusta.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the LDA $DC01 instruction at $3EE7 to be JSR $1000 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $1000 which checks if RETURN is pressed and if so, simply returns to allow the game to start. If not, then it then checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if RETURN is pressed and start the game.
